messages.content:
please list spanish of points important this text:The coil designer is obliged to determine the length of the iron core from the experience of others, as the mathe- matics for calculating it is too complex, although simple and useful in the case of closed circuit transformers. If the core is made too long the primary magnetizing current will be too large, while if made too short the secondary coils would have to be made of too large a diameter to be efficient. There is, therefore, a certain length which will give the best results.

In the case of this transformer the length of the core was determined after having gained all possible information from certain eminent men who had made a life study of these matters; in fact, all the dimensions of the transformer for this special use were determined in this way.

El diseñador de la bobina está obligado a determinar la longitud del núcleo de hierro a partir de la experiencia de otros, ya que las matemáticas para calcularlo son demasiado complejas, aunque simples y útiles en el caso de los transformadores de circuito cerrado. Si el núcleo es demasiado largo, la corriente de magnetización primaria será demasiado grande, mientras que si es demasiado corto, las bobinas secundarias tendrían que ser de demasiado gran diámetro para ser eficientes. Por lo tanto, existe una cierta longitud que dará los mejores resultados.

En el caso de este transformador, la longitud del núcleo se determinó después de haber obtenido toda la información posible de ciertos hombres eminentes que habían estudiado toda su vida estos asuntos; de hecho, todas las dimensiones del transformador para este uso especial fueron determinadas de esta manera.

please list of points important this text ,translate spanish:The coil designer is obliged to determine the length of the iron core from the experience of others, as the mathe- matics for calculating it is too complex, although simple and useful in the case of closed circuit transformers. If the core is made too long the primary magnetizing current will be too large, while if made too short the secondary coils would have to be made of too large a diameter to be efficient. There is, therefore, a certain length which will give the best results.

In the case of this transformer the length of the core was determined after having gained all possible information from certain eminent men who had made a life study of these matters; in fact, all the dimensions of the transformer for this special use were determined in this way.

- The length of the iron core in a coil must be determined by the designer.
- The designer must rely on the experience of others as the math behind calculating the length is too complex.
- The length of the core is simple and useful for closed circuit transformers.
- If the core is too long, then the primary magnetizing current will be too large.
- If the core is too short, the secondary coils will need to be made of too large a diameter to be efficient.
- A certain length of the core will provide the best results.
- The length of the core for the transformer in question was determined by gaining information from experts who had studied this matter for their entire lives.
- All the dimensions of the transformer were determined through this process for this specific use. 

En resumen, el diseñador de una bobina debe determinar la longitud del núcleo de hierro en la bobina, lo que debe basarse en la experiencia de otros porque las matemáticas para calcularlo son complejas. Si la longitud del núcleo no es la adecuada, la eficiencia de la bobina se ve afectada. En el caso del transformador mencionado, la longitud del núcleo se determinó mediante la información obtenida de expertos en la materia y se establecieron todas las dimensiones del transformador para un uso específico.

- En el caso de este transformador, la longitud del núcleo se determinó consultando a expertos en la materia.

please in a nutshell briefly list of points important this text:a career in electrical and electronic troubleshooting can be a very financially rewarding and personally satisfying one. The expert troubleshooter has a unique blend of understanding
electronic theory, problem-solving techniques, and hands-on skills. Most electronic products and devices contain similar components, such as resistors, capacitors, diodes, transistors, contacts, connectors, and wire. Understanding common faults of these components and how to test them is a prerequisite for the troubleshooter. In this chapter, you will learn basic problem-solving analysis, common circuit faults, various troubleshooting methods, and testing procedures for the most common electrical or electronic components.

- Una carrera en solución de problemas eléctricos y electrónicos puede ser financieramente gratificante y personalmente satisfactoria.
- El solucionador de problemas experto tiene una combinación única de comprensión de la teoría electrónica, técnicas de resolución de problemas y habilidades prácticas.
- Los productos y dispositivos electrónicos suelen contener componentes similares como resistores, capacitores, diodos, transistores, contactos, conectores y cables.
- Es necesario comprender las fallas comunes de estos componentes y cómo probarlos como requisito previo para el solucionador de problemas.
- En este capítulo, se aprenderán técnicas básicas de análisis de resolución de problemas, fallas comunes en los circuitos, diversos métodos de solución de problemas y procedimientos de prueba para los componentes eléctricos o electrónicos más comunes.

please in a nutshell briefly list of important points this text: Before attempting to service a device, you must first develop an understanding of problem solving and how this concept applies to overall troubleshooting and repair. Think of servicing a device as having three phases: (1) situational analysis, (2) problem solving, and (3) decision making. You must proceed in this logical manner; otherwise mistakes, accidents, and wasted time and expense may result. For example, many troubleshooters, upon the discovery of a blown fuse, just replace the fuse, instead of first determining the source of the problem, perhaps only to have another fuse blow. Therefore, situational analysis is the first step in servicing a device. It involves critical scrutiny
and analysis of a problem situation. It allows the troubleshooter to gain insight into an unacceptable condition. It is defined as simply looking at the overall condition of the device and determining whether a problem even exists.

- Antes de intentar reparar un dispositivo, es importante comprender el proceso de resolución de problemas y cómo aplicarlo a la solución de problemas y reparación en general.
- Al reparar un dispositivo se deben seguir tres fases: análisis situacional, resolución de problemas y toma de decisiones, desarrollando un proceso lógico.
- La fase de análisis situacional es la primera, que permite una visión detallada de la situación de problema para averiguar si existe un problema o no antes de tomar medidas.
- Los errores, accidentes, tiempo y gastos innecesarios pueden evitarse mediante un adecuado análisis situacional.
- El análisis situacional consiste en una evaluación crítica y análisis de una situación problemática en la que el técnico puede obtener información valiosa para entender la situación y determinar si ha ocurrido un problema.
please in a nutshell the previous message

The text explains the importance of a logical approach to repairing devices, including situational analysis, problem-solving, and decision-making. The first step, situational analysis, involves evaluating the device to determine if there is actually a problem before proceeding. This helps prevent mistakes, accidents, wasted time, and unnecessary expenses.
